title: alchemilla arvensis var. cornucopioides
intro: Alchemilla arvensis var. cornucopioides, also known as the lesser lady's mantle, is a variety of the alchemilla arvensis plant, a flowering perennial native to Europe. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its high tannin and flavonoid content, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla arvensis var. cornucopioides include soothing menstrual cramps, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health issues. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla arvensis var. cornucopioides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin issues.
